size.note: two cohesive new files (impl + its integration test); single concern

completeness.note: new source ships with its integration test; 100% coverage on session_viewer.py

architecture.note: deps inward (stdlib + daemon_client only); timeouts on every request; no secrets; AF_UNIX local; no-logging is correct per NFR-SEC-03

security.note: no auth surface (server-side binding guard); bytes never logged; no injection/shell/eval; spawn_command is the contract-controlled ensure_daemon seam

quality.note: ruff clean; mypy 0 errors on file; compileall OK; 9 tests / 100% cov; no dead surface; no CR-10 perf anti-patterns
